channel.title: INtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Curling Controversy at the Winter Olympics Isn’t What You Think
item.description: After Swedish curler Oskar Eriksson accused Canadian vice-skip Marc Kennedy of cheating last week, everyone has become an expert in curling rules. The...

item.title: Meta and Other Tech Companies Ban OpenClaw Over Cybersecurity Concerns
item.description: Security experts have urged people to be cautious with the viral agentic AI tool, known for being highly capable but also wildly unpredictable.

item.title: Inside the Homeland Security Forum Where ICE Agents Talk Shit About Other Agents
item.description: Forum members have discussed their discomfort with mass deportation efforts, debate how federal agents have interacted with civilians, and complain ab...

item.title: Apple is reportedly cooking up a trio of AI wearables
item.description: As the AI hardware space heats up, the iPhone maker has multiple smart products in development.

item.title: Thrive raises $10B for new fund, its largest yet
item.description: Thrive Capital just raised $10 billion for its new fund-- nearly double the size of its last fund.

item.title: The Simplest Android App for Scanning Documents
item.description: Most scanning apps try to get you to buy a cloud storage subscription or pay for extras. Not FairScan, which is free and open-source, and has some pow...

item.title: Anthropic releases Sonnet 4.6
item.description: Anthropic has released a new version of its mid-size Sonnet model, keeping pace with the company's four-month update cycle.

item.title: Meta’s own research found parental supervision doesn’t really help curb teens’ compulsive social media use
item.description: An internal research study at Meta found that parental supervision may not help teens regulate their social media, and teens with trauma are more incl...

item.title: Climactic launches hybrid fund to get startups through the ‘valley of death’
item.description: The new project, called Material Scale, will initially focus on climate tech startups in the apparel industry.

item.title: The Best Noise-Canceling Headphones for Traveling Are $50 Off
item.description: With excellent noise canceling, the QuietComfort Ultra 2 would love to join you on your next long-haul flight.
